category_sources: Official docs describe Talisman as preventing potential secrets or sensitive information from leaving a developer workstation; source_facts.description says it detects and prevents secrets from being checked in.
display_name_sources: Official project site heading uses TALISMAN; current_curation.display-name/source_facts.name provide talisman.
docs_sources: Official Talisman site has a dedicated Documentation link at /docs with getting started, installation, usage, and configuration sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/thoughtworks/talisman; repo not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs describe Talisman as a repository hook and repository history scanner for potential SSH keys, authorization tokens, and private keys; source_facts.executables lists talisman.
